message:
feat(components,viz,e2e): enhance UI polish, add 3 new visualizations, and expand test coverage

New visualization components:
- backpressure-health-viz.tsx: interactive backpressure health
  monitoring visualization showing system load and flow control
- commit-coalescer-viz.tsx: visualization of commit coalescing
  behavior demonstrating batched write optimization
- conflict-cascade-viz.tsx: conflict cascade visualization showing
  how reservation conflicts propagate through agent networks

UI/UX improvements across site:
- page.tsx: refine homepage layout, spacing, and content hierarchy
- site-header.tsx: expand navigation with improved responsive
  behavior and accessibility
- site-footer.tsx: update footer layout and link structure
- bottom-sheet.tsx: enhance mobile bottom sheet with smoother
  animations and better touch handling
- client-shell.tsx: improve shell component state management and
  layout calculations
- custom-cursor.tsx: refine cursor tracking behavior
- hero-media.tsx: update hero section media handling
- robot-mascot.tsx: improve mascot animation and interaction
- tooltip.tsx: enhance tooltip positioning and styling
- glow-orbits.tsx: update orbital glow effects
- agent-flywheel.tsx: expand flywheel animation with richer
  state transitions

Visualization refinements:
- agent-handshake-viz.tsx: major refactor with improved animation
  flow, better state machine, and cleaner visual hierarchy
- territory-map-viz.tsx: enhance territory rendering with better
  color scaling and boundary detection
- stress-gauntlet-viz.tsx: improve stress test visualization clarity
- swarm-simulation-viz.tsx: refine swarm particle behavior
- reliability-internals-viz.tsx: update reliability diagram layout
- viz-framework.tsx: streamline shared viz utilities
- Various other viz components: minor type and rendering fixes

Content and configuration:
- glossary/page.tsx: expand glossary entries
- getting-started/page.tsx: minor content fix
- globals.css: update global styles
- lib/content.ts: refine content utilities
- lib/utils.ts: add new shared utility functions
- hooks/use-intersection-observer.ts: improve observer hook
- spec-explorer/spec-viewer.tsx: enhance spec viewer rendering
- next.config.ts: update Next.js configuration
- next-env.d.ts: regenerated type declarations

Testing:
- e2e/metadata.spec.ts: expand metadata validation coverage
- e2e/navigation.spec.ts: update navigation test expectations
- e2e/smoke.spec.ts: adjust smoke test assertions
- playwright.config.ts: update test configuration

Beads: update issue tracker state and history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
